action.reasoning: Observation: mean_reward=0.1307, success_rate=0.15. FourRooms works (56%), DoorKey-16x16 partial (28%), but KeyCorridorS3R3, LockedRoom, MultiRoom-N6 all 0%. Analysis: FlatObsWrapper creates 2835-dim input which is hard for MLP. Need CNN approach with ImgObsWrapper (147-dim image). Also need more training and higher entropy to explore pickup/toggle actions. Decision: Switch to CNN with ImgObsWrapper, train 10M steps, use larger network, higher entropy coefficient.
